description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:4.9-jdk10 Docker image, sets the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false, and exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the current working directory in a global before_script. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that caches the build and .gradle directories with key $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME (policy push) and runs the command `gradle --build-cache assemble`. In the test stage add a test job that pulls the same cache and runs `gradle check`. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on tags and the master branch, pushes the cache, executes `gradle build`, and publishes the eight JAR files under Configs/, GUI/, Utility/, Logging/, Modding/, Components/, Taks/, and Dialogs/ as artifacts, and also add a pages job that runs only on master and tags, runs `echo 'Nothing to do...'`, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact.
